user.title: Porsche Mobile Charger Connect
user.description: Enter the charger's IP address or hostname. The password is the "Home User" web-interface password and is only required if you want to control the charging current limit.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the charger. Check the host/IP and that you are on the same network.
error.invalid_auth: The password was rejected by the charger.
